'''Llez''' was the son of [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Zell]] of [[Majoor]] who purchased the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. During his [[Peace mission to Armath|diplomatic mission]] to [[Armath]], he ordered the droids to serve as tutors and companions to Llez. Llez had [[Dream/Legends|dreams]] of dismantling C-3PO and selling his parts, as well as using R2-D2's mechanical contraptions for entertainment.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Spelled backwards, "Llez" is "Zell", the name of his father.
